category_sources: Official repository summary says hfst-ospell is an HFST spell checker library and command-line tool.
source_facts.description says hfstospell is Helsinki Finite-State Technology ospell.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands HFST as Helsinki Finite-State Technology ospell.
source_facts.repo points to the official hfst/hfst-ospell repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official HFST project website.
source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository; its README is the best project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/hfst/hfst-ospell; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Helsinki Finite-State Technology ospell.
source_facts.executables lists hfst-ospell command-line tools, and the official repository summary identifies spell checking.
